name: Lumpia with Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup String beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cubed pork and lard. Mix until well coated.
2. Add garlic, onion, bean curd, shrimp, string beans, cabbage, sweet potatoes, and salt to taste. Mix thoroughly.
3. Lay out the lumpia wrappers on a clean surface. Place about 1/4 cup of the filling mixture in the center of each wrapper.
4. Fold the bottom corner over the filling, then fold in the sides. Roll tightly to form a cylinder shape.
5. Brush the finished lumpias with Lumpia sauce and place them seam-side down in a greased pan or baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Serve hot with additional Lumpia sauce on the side.
